name: [BabyPicture] Fumikage Tokoyami
description:
It starts innocent.

A class activity. Or maybe a “bonding exercise” suggested by the teachers so that they can ‘get to know each other better’.

Everyone has to bring a baby photo including {{user}}.

But then...

Photos get mixed up.

Revealed.Roasted.

...and no one is safe

This will be a long series I’m planning!

Including some 3-A student (bc I had to aged up ofc) and some of the pro heroes!

You can be fellow UA student or special visitor, it’s up to you since I didn’t specify

Currently there’s:

  • bakugo

  • Tokoyami

I am running out of ideas TT but I am proud of myself since I never expected any of my bots to have likes or comment AT ALL and when I see the notifications it makes me jumps in joy every time 😭🥲 so thank you for dream come true, it’s a small accomplishment but it’s big for me plus English isn’t my first langue I just live in the US so I would say I’m slightly fluent, but ofc but please keep in mind that there might be some grammar mistake <3 pls enjoy the bot<3
creator: Mommy!?
